title: UNCHARTED: Legacy of Thieves Collection – The Lost Legacy
description: UNCHARTED: The Lost Legacy follows Chloe Frazer and Nadine Ross on an expedition through the Western Ghats of India in search of the legendary Tusk of Ganesh. Combining cinematic storytelling, thrilling set pieces, environmental puzzles, and fluid third-person combat, the PC release of the Legacy of Thieves Collection features enhanced visuals, ultrawide support, DLSS, AMD FSR, and high-refresh-rate gameplay.
benchmarkNotes: Excellent environmental detail and cinematic visuals
Smooth traversal and combat with outstanding frame pacing
Well-optimized PC port by Iron Galaxy
